nodes.name: Set  HTML

conditions.rightValue: No authorization information present on the request.

parameters.query:
SELECT q.id, q.query_id AS "queryId", q.revision_query AS "revisionQuery",
       q.type, q.description, q.application
FROM revision_queries q
JOIN revision_query_scopes s ON s.revision_query_id = q.id
WHERE q.type = $1 AND (s.country=$2 OR s.country='ALL')
                  AND (s.target_env=$3 OR s.target_env='ALL')
GROUP BY q.id;

parameters.content:
## application = viga
## type == json.type
## country -- env
